headline: Nucleus Research Releases 2026 PLM Technology Value Matrix
summary: In 2026, product lifecycle management is generating measurable ROI by moving from document control to coordinated execution across engineering, manufacturing, quality, and supply chain. Organizations are consolidating fragmented product data from spreadsheets and point tools into unified environments that improve governance, reduce rework, and shorten development cycles. The value is evident in faster change processing, fewer version conflicts, and clearer visibility into product status across t

headline: Autodesk (ADSK) Completes Acquisition of Rhumbix to Enhance Real-Time Jobsite Data Capture
summary: Autodesk Inc. (NASDAQ:ADSK) is one of the best enterprise software stocks to buy right now. On March 31, Autodesk closed its acquisition of Rhumbix, a construction technology company specializing in real-time jobsite data capture. The move aims to bridge the persistent gap between field activity and backward-looking financial reporting, which often causes cost overruns and […]

headline: Autodesk (ADSK) Valuation Check As Small Business Initiative Draws Fresh Investor Attention
summary: Autodesk (ADSK) has put small businesses in focus with the launch of Autodesk for Small Business, a dedicated hub, flexible pricing options, and product tweaks aimed at smaller design, manufacturing, and media teams. See our latest analysis for Autodesk. The launch of Autodesk for Small Business comes as the stock has seen a mixed picture, with a 7 day share price return of 5.32% and a year to date share price decline of 13.67%.
